purpose: Use a scoped fake credential for an approved local signing action without exposing secret material to model context.
sanitized_output: sanitized status only: signing action completed with credential material redacted and no secret bytes included.
residual_leak_risk: Residual leak risk: timing and log metadata are not modeled.
does not prove runtime containment or support-state promotion
revocation_path: expire lease, revoke handle mapping, and zeroize simulated substitution material
